reason: The 'native workflow execution' feature is a core, mature component of the system with extensive end-to-end tests in `crates/orchestrator-cli/tests/`. A temporary smoke test is no longer relevant or necessary.

evidence.description: The `workflow-runner` crate is the mature engine for native workflow execution.
The `orchestrator-cli` provides the user-facing commands for managing workflows.
The codebase contains extensive end-to-end tests for CLI workflow operations, superseding the need for a simple smoke test.
Project documentation details the workflow-first architecture, indicating feature maturity.
